preguntas.pregunta: [1/40] ___ is your favorite singer? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about a person.
[2/40] ___ do you live? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about a place.
[3/40] ___ does the movie start? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about time.
[4/40] ___ are you crying? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask for a reason.
[5/40] ___ is your phone number? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask for information.
[6/40] ___ color do you prefer, blue or red? Q: Choose the correct question word for choosing between options.
[7/40] ___ do you bake a chocolate cake? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about a process or method.
[8/40] ___ book is this on the floor? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about possession.
[9/40] ___ students are there in the classroom? Q: Choose the correct question word for countable quantities.
[10/40] ___ milk do we need for the recipe? Q: Choose the correct question word for uncountable quantities.
[11/40] ___ is that man near the door? Q: Choose the correct question word to identify a person.
[12/40] ___ did you put my car keys? Q: Choose the correct question word to locate an object.
[13/40] ___ is your birthday? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask for a specific date.
[14/40] ___ did you choose this university? Q: Choose the correct question word to explain a choice.
[15/40] ___ languages can you speak fluently? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about specific things.
[16/40] ___ coat is warmer, the black one or the brown one? Q: Choose the correct question word to compare choices.
[17/40] ___ do you spell your last name? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about a procedure.
[18/40] ___ keys are these on the kitchen table? Q: Choose the correct question word for belonging.
[19/40] ___ siblings do you have? Q: Choose the correct question word for a countable number of family members.
[20/40] ___ money did you spend on the laptop? Q: Choose the correct question word for price or currency.
[21/40] ___ broke the expensive glass vase? Q: Choose the correct question word for the subject person of an action.
[22/40] ___ is the nearest subway station? Q: Choose the correct question word for directions to a place.
[23/40] ___ do you usually wake up on weekends? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask for a time or hour.
[24/40] ___ didn't you call me last night? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask for a missing reason.
[25/40] ___ is your favorite hobby? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about an activity.
[26/40] ___ bus goes to the city center, number 5 or number 9? Q: Choose the correct question word for a limited selection.
[27/40] ___ do you feel today after the doctor's visit? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about health or mood.
[28/40] ___ turn is it to wash the dirty dishes? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about the responsible owner.
[29/40] ___ hours do you sleep every night? Q: Choose the correct question word for countable units of time.
[30/40] ___ water should we drink daily? Q: Choose the correct question word for an uncountable volume.
[31/40] ___ told you that secret yesterday? Q: Choose the correct question word for the person who spoke.
[32/40] ___ can I buy a fresh newspaper around here? Q: Choose the correct question word for a retail location.
[33/40] ___ is the best season to visit Japan? Q: Choose the correct question word for a period of time.
[34/40] ___ do cats purr when they are happy? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask for a biological explanation.
[35/40] ___ happened at the end of the movie? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about an event.
[36/40] ___ computer is yours, the laptop or the desktop? Q: Choose the correct question word for a specific alternative.
[37/40] ___ does the internet connection work? Q: Choose the correct question word to ask about a system mechanism.
[38/40] ___ car is blocking our private driveway? Q: Choose the correct question word to find the owner of the vehicle.
[39/40] ___ correct answers did you get in the test? Q: Choose the correct question word for a countable score.
[40/40] ___ time do we have left before the train leaves? Q: Choose the correct question word for the uncountable concept of time.
